creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Thu Apr 17 03:03:07 2014
New Revision: 351438
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351438
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351438/

Log:
  - Update to 3.0.19 [2]
  - Pass libtrace_doxygen=false to configure script to avoid extra docs in case
    doxygen is installed [1]
  
  PR:		ports/175888 [1]
  PR:		ports/188065 [2]
  Submitted by:	pclin [1]
  Submitted by:	swills (myself) [2]
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (matt@peterson.org, >14 months)
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (matt@peterson.org, >2 weeks)

Modified:
  head/net/libtrace/Makefile
  head/net/libtrace/distinfo
  head/net/libtrace/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net/libtrace/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/libtrace/Makefile	Thu Apr 17 02:40:49 2014	(r351437)
+++ head/net/libtrace/Makefile	Thu Apr 17 03:03:07 2014	(r351438)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	libtrace
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.15
+PORTVERSION=	3.0.19
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://research.wand.net.nz/software/libtrace/
 
@@ -11,7 +11,8 @@ COMMENT=	C library for network packet ca
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	pcap:${PORTSDIR}/net/libpcap
 
-CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-libpcap=${LOCALBASE}
+CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-libpcap=${LOCALBASE} \
+		libtrace_doxygen=false
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes

Modified: head/net/libtrace/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net/libtrace/distinfo	Thu Apr 17 02:40:49 2014	(r351437)
+++ head/net/libtrace/distinfo	Thu Apr 17 03:03:07 2014	(r351438)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

-SIZE (libtrace-3.0.15.tar.gz) = 1436159
+SHA256 (libtrace-3.0.19.tar.gz) = 3e16f9168300905b4c20dfc4417d9bb33a6ab134023084766126caa27c3015c3
+SIZE (libtrace-3.0.19.tar.gz) = 837453
